title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Chapped Lips
description: Melissa officinalis tinctures contains rosmarinic acid, a key bioactive constituent that helps soothe and protect chapped lips. This compound has anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce redness and irritation, allowing the skin to heal faster. Rosmarinic acid also has antioxidant properties, neutralizing free radicals that can cause damage and dryness.
